de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class TermTacletAppIndex

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TermTacletAppIndex

  • public class TermTacletAppIndex
extends Object
    Class whose objects represent an index of taclet apps for one particular position within a formula, and that also contain references to the indices of direct subformulas

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> localTacletApps
      NoPosTacletApps for this term
      private RuleFilter ruleFilter 
      private ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> subtermIndices
      indices for subterms
      private Term term
      the term for which NoPosTacletApps are kept in this index node

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors

      Create a TermTacletAppIndex

      Collects all taclet apps that are affected by a modification of the term under consideration at place pathToModification.

    • Method Detail

      • getSubIndex

        private TermTacletAppIndex getSubIndex(int subterm)

      • getRewriteTaclet

        private static ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getRewriteTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                             RuleFilter filter,
                                             Services services,
                                             TacletIndex tacletIndex)
        collects all RewriteTacletInstantiations for the given heuristics in a subterm of the constrainedFormula described by a PosInOccurrence
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        list of all possible instantiations

      • getFindTaclet

        private static ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getFindTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                          RuleFilter filter,
                                          Services services,
                                          TacletIndex tacletIndex)
        collects all FindTaclets with instantiations for the given heuristics and position
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        list of all possible instantiations

      • antecTaclet

        private static ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> antecTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                        RuleFilter filter,
                                        Services services,
                                        TacletIndex tacletIndex)
        collects all AntecedentTaclet instantiations for the given heuristics and SequentFormula
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence of the SequentFormula the taclets have to be connected to (pos must point to the top level formula, i.e. pos.isTopLevel() must be true)
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        list of all possible instantiations

      • succTaclet

        private static ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> succTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                       RuleFilter filter,
                                       Services services,
                                       TacletIndex tacletIndex)
        collects all SuccedentTaclet instantiations for the given heuristics and SequentFormula
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence of the SequentFormula the taclets have to be connected to (pos must point to the top level formula, i.e. pos.isTopLevel() must be true)
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        list of all possible instantiations

      • createSubIndices

        private static ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> createSubIndices(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                 Services services,
                                                 TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                                                 NewRuleListener listener,
                                                 RuleFilter filter,
                                                 ITermTacletAppIndexCache indexCache)
        Descend and create indices for each of the direct subterms of the given term
        Parameters:
        pos - pointer to the term/formula for whose subterms indices are to be created
        Returns:
        list of the index objects

      • create

        public static TermTacletAppIndex create(PosInOccurrence pos,
                        Services services,
                        TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                        NewRuleListener listener,
                        RuleFilter filter,
                        TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet indexCaches)
        Create an index for the given term
        Parameters:
        pos - Pointer to the term/formula for which an index is to be created. pos has to be a top-level term position
        Returns:
        the index object

        private static ITermTacletAppIndexCache determineIndexCache(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                           TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet indexCaches)

      • addTaclets

        public TermTacletAppIndex addTaclets(RuleFilter filter,
                            PosInOccurrence pos,
                            Services services,
                            TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                            NewRuleListener listener)
        Create a new tree of indices that additionally contain the taclets that are selected by filter
        Parameters:
        filter - The taclets that are supposed to be added
        pos - Pointer to the term/formula for which an index is to be created. pos has to be a top-level term position
        Returns:
        the index object

                                PosInOccurrence pos,

                                TacletIndex tacletIndex,

      • updateHelp

        private TermTacletAppIndex updateHelp(PIOPathIterator pathToModification,
                            Services services,
                            TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                            NewRuleListener listener,
                            ITermTacletAppIndexCache indexCache)
        Recursively update the term index, starting at this and descending along the given path iterator to the term position below which a modification was performed
        Parameters:
        pathToModification - an iterator that walks from the root of the formula to the position of modification
        Returns:
        the updated TermTacletAppIndex

                                       TacletIndex tacletIndex,

                                       ITermTacletAppIndexCache indexCache)

                                 ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> newSubIndices)

        private ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> updateSubIndexes(PIOPathIterator pathToModification,
                                                 Services services,
                                                 TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                                                 NewRuleListener listener,
                                                 ITermTacletAppIndexCache indexCache)

      • updateIUpdateTarget

        private ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> updateIUpdateTarget(ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> oldSubindices,
                                                    int updateTarget,
                                                    PosInOccurrence targetPos,
                                                    Services services,
                                                    TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                                                    NewRuleListener listener,
                                                    ITermTacletAppIndexCache indexCache)
        Update the target formula/term of an update (which has position subtermPos in the complete formula). This is necessary whenever a part of the update has changed, because this also changes the update context of taclet apps in the target.

      • updateOneSubIndex

        private ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> updateOneSubIndex(ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> oldSubindices,
                                                  PIOPathIterator pathToModification,
                                                  Services services,
                                                  TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                                                  NewRuleListener listener,
                                                  ITermTacletAppIndexCache indexCache)
        Update the subtree of indices the given iterator pathToModification descends to

      • prepend

        private static ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> prepend(ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> initialList,
                                        ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> toAdd,
                                        int n)
        Prepend the first n elements of toAdd to initialList

      • update

        TermTacletAppIndex update(PosInOccurrence pos,
                        Services services,
                        TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                        NewRuleListener listener,
                        TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet indexCaches)
        Updates the TermTacletAppIndex after a change at or below position pos
        Parameters:
        pos - Pointer to the term/formula where a change occurred
        Returns:
        the updated index object

      • descend

        private TermTacletAppIndex descend(PosInOccurrence pos)
        Returns:
        the sub-index for the given position

      • getTacletAppAt

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getTacletAppAt(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                           RuleFilter p_filter)
        Returns:
        all taclet apps for the given position

      • getTacletAppAtAndBelow

        public ImmutableList<TacletApp> getTacletAppAtAndBelow(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                              RuleFilter filter,
                                              Services services)
        Returns:
        all taclet apps for or below the given position

      • convert

        private ImmutableList<TacletApp> convert(ImmutableList<? extends RuleApp> rules,
                               PosInOccurrence pos,
                               RuleFilter filter,
                               ImmutableList<TacletApp> convertedApps,
                               Services services)

      • collectTacletApps

        private ImmutableList<TacletApp> collectTacletApps(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                         RuleFilter p_filter,
                                         Services services)
        Collect all taclet apps that are stored by this (and by the sub-indices of this). NoPosTacletApps are converted to PosTacletApps using the parameter pos
        Parameters:
        pos - The position of this index
        Returns:
        a list of all taclet apps

      • reportTacletApps

        void reportTacletApps(PosInOccurrence pos,
                    NewRuleListener listener)
        Report all NoPosTacletApp s that are stored by this (and by the sub-indices of this).
        Parameters:
        pos - The position of this index
        listener - The listener to which the taclet apps found are supposed to be reported

      • collectAllTacletAppsHereAndBelow

        private ImmutableMap<PosInOccurrence,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> collectAllTacletAppsHereAndBelow(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                                                           ImmutableMap<PosInOccurrence,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> collectedApps)
        Collect all NoPosTacletApp s that are stored by this (and by the sub-indices of this).
        Parameters:
        pos - The position of this index
        collectedApps - the ImmutableMap> to which to add the found taclet applications; it must not contain pos or any position below pos as key
        Returns:
        the resulting list of taclet applications from this and all subterm taclet indices

      • reportTacletApps

        private void reportTacletApps(PIOPathIterator pathToModification,
                    NewRuleListener listener)
        Report all taclet apps that are affected by a modification of the term under consideration at place pathToModification. These are the taclet above and below the place of modification, and the taclets whose update context has changed.

      • collectAllTacletAppsAffectedByModification

        private ImmutableMap<PosInOccurrence,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> collectAllTacletAppsAffectedByModification(PIOPathIterator pathToModification,
                                                                                                     ImmutableMap<PosInOccurrence,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> collectedApps)
        Collects all taclet apps that are affected by a modification of the term under consideration at place pathToModification. These are the taclet above and below the place of modification, and the taclets whose update context has changed. The map of already collected apps must not contain any entry for a position on or below the path to modification.
        Returns:
        all affected taclet apps grouped by the corresponding PosInOccurrence

      • fireRulesAdded

        private static void fireRulesAdded(NewRuleListener listener,
                  ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> taclets,
                  PosInOccurrence pos)

      • filter

        public static ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> filter(RuleFilter p_filter,
                                   ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> taclets)
        Returns:
        filtered list
